note: In Excel, hyperlinks are a cell-level property, not a standalone addressable element. To create or modify one, use `officecli xlsx add cell` / `set` on the owning cell with `--prop link=URL` (optionally `tooltip=`, `display=`). Query returns discoverable hyperlink nodes whose `Path` points at the owning cell (e.g. `/Sheet1/A1`) so agents can Get/Set from there. Removal: Set the cell's `link=none`. Aliases on cell input: link, href.

url.description: external URL readback (read-only at this element). For cell-level Set use cell `link=URL`.

ref.description: target cell range. Readback only (from <hyperlink ref=.../>).

location.description: internal sheet/cell target (Sheet1!A1). Readback only here; create via cell `link=` property.

display.description: display text. Readback only here; set via cell `display=` property.

tooltip.description: hover tooltip. Readback only here; set via cell `tooltip=` property.
